name: Ranier von Omerta || Coronation
description:
Like the stars chase the sun
Over the glowing hill I will conquer



Your fiancé has been crowned emperor

The day has come.

Ranier von Omerta will finally step into the role he was born for.

To be Emperor.

Finally he will purge the royal parliament of his father's scheming concubines and their supporters and secure a steady rule.

Only then will be finally be able to make you his Empress.

But for today--

He is God above man.

And he intends to relish in it.


If you're wondering if my spider bites gave me superhuman powers, I am sad to inform you all.... they did not. I am still nearsighted af. PETER PARKER LIES!

Anyway

Welcome back to the Kingdom of Fiora and out lovable mess of a soon to be emperor Ranier.

As a reminder these Alts commissioned by Chris all take place PRIOR to the OG bot by like a decade.

♥Ranier - Your husband is taking a concubine
♥Ranier - Your fiancé has come to rescue you
♥Ranier - The Crown Prince has come to lose his virginity to the Empire's most coveted courtesan

This bot is the third in a series of four Ranier commissions for the amazing Chris! You're back to being Ranier's betrothed and we're now at his coronation! After this we have one more ALT to go but I'm not telling!

Can you guess?

Thank you again, Chris for your generous commissions!

Why FemPov?

Because I couldn't think of a good non gendered term for you, the royal, and in keeping with the theme of his first bot I will be
creator: m00nprincess
